title: redstone i/o
description: 一个红石维修拓展组件 | A Redstone repair extension kit
body:
提示:此模组是由mcreator制作的低创(可能吧?应该是)作品

由于英语文本为机器翻译,对说英语的玩家及审核员可能会不友好,抱歉啦!

这个模组能让你的红石机器设计与调试工作变得更棒!

添加了几类方块:

--红石显示器:无延迟的红石信号显示方块(说了这么多不就是无延迟红石灯嘛),有4种样式,适合用在红石显示屏上

--模电红石灯:显示信号强度(所以为什么不用红石显示材质包呢)

--信号输出方块:可以输出任意强度的信号

--断点方块:可以远程看到此处的红石信号强度


Tip:This module is a low-inventory (maybe? It should be.

The English text is machine translated, so it may not be friendly to English speaking players and reviewers, sorry!

This module will make your redstone machine design and debugging work even better!

Several types of cubes have been added.

--Redstone Display: Non-latency redstone signal display cubes (that's what they are, non-latency 
 redstone lamps), available in 4 styles, suitable for use in redstone displays.

--Redstone Module Lamps: display signal strength (so why not use redstone to display the texture pack).
--Signal Output Cube: can output signal of any strength.

--Breakpoint box: you can remotely see the signal strength of the redstone here.
